name: Sandpoint Bookcase with Drawers - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Wood Veneer Tall Cabinet, 3 Shelves
description:
The Sandpoint Bookcase with Drawers from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee blends style and function to upgrade any space in your home. Made from MDF with a wood frame in a natural hue, this bookcase pairs easily with a variety of other decor. It's designed with three open-back shelves plus three drawers with brass-finish pull knobs, giving you plenty of space for storage and display, and the anti-tip anchoring hardware gives you some extra peace of mind.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
